titleStmt.title: SII 27.399: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 399. (A.R. No. 306 of 1931-32.) KAKKUÑJE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab built into east wall of the central shrine of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This multilated record registers a gift of land to a maṭha and for conducting Rudra-pūje in the temple of Māhādēva, Saṅkaradēva. The gift was entrusted to Kariya Lakhaṇṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The beginning of the record is lost.
div.p:
baḷiyavana paḍuva Oyala gade 2 ṟamēle muḍe 4 sēnabōva
lu dikiḷaguḷiyana gade ho māḍida gadeyi 3 mēle muḍi
vinagade teṁgina diga ḍe yi 3 mēle mu ḍe 2 damūli paramēsarana ka
2 mēre bahudu bi gade 2 yi 4 mēle mūḍe 4 bāryyati kri kriṣana kaṁnara gade 1
ya hāḷi 1 I 2 mēlemūḍi 2 posanakiṟa gade 1 mēlemuḍi 1 gavāryya beṭadagade
gade mēlemūḍe nāvāḍanabaguḷagade mēle mūḍe 2 cacibenahalisina gade 1 tu hi
nagade 1 I 2 mēlehāne 50 Aḍigaḷa bārasagade mēle�ne 30 varuṣaṁ prati yipatu mu
ḍi Ākiyanu maṭhake naḍasuveŪ saṁkaradēva Oḍēru mahadēvarali rudrapūjege
ḍida Aki mūḍe 5 Agrada bhattada bage Aki mūḍe 19 Ubhayaṁ 21 mūḍe Akkiyanu varusaṁ
prati dināya yibaru brāhmarige Uru nālvaru hālo kalu naḍasi dēvasvatetu sarvamānya vāgi Iha
ru Idaṟa pārūpatya kariya lakhaṁṇagaḷu I dharmake Āḷupidake gōva koṁda pāpake hōharu
Digital edition of SII 27.399 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
